hero.title:
Travel Korea
By Your Mood
hero.subtitle: Upload a photo that inspires you. MOODI finds Korean spots that match your aesthetic — perfectly.

persona.title: Who MOODI is for
persona.subtitle: Travelers who have a clear aesthetic but struggle to find spots that match it in Korea.

items.name: Yuki
items.quote: I want spots in Seoul that feel like my Pinterest board — not the ones every tourist visits.

items.name: Luna
items.quote: I need unique spots that match my aesthetic, not just popular ones everyone's already been to.

items.name: Jake
items.quote: I want to experience the real Korea — local neighborhoods, hidden gems, authentic culture.

problem.title:
Finding your vibe in Korea
is harder than it should be
problem.subtitle: Millions of travelers visit Korea each year. Most end up at the same 10 spots.

items.title: Generic Recommendations
items.desc: Existing travel apps recommend the same popular spots to everyone, regardless of personal aesthetic or style preference.

items.title: Language Barrier
items.desc: Researching niche Korean spots without reading Korean is time-consuming, and translations miss cultural nuance.

items.title: Planning Overload
items.desc: Building a coherent travel itinerary requires hours of research, cross-referencing maps, and manual optimization.

solution.title:
Just show us
your mood
solution.subtitle: No keywords. No language barrier. Just photos that represent the vibe you want.

steps.title: Upload Your Vibe
steps.desc: Select photos that capture the aesthetic you're looking for — a film cafe, a moody street, a vintage corner you love.

steps.title: AI Finds Your Spots
steps.desc: MOODI's AI analyzes the mood and aesthetic of your photos, then surfaces Korean locations that match — pinned on a map.

steps.title: Plan in Seconds
steps.desc: Pick your must-visit spots. Our AI builds an optimized day-by-day itinerary, considering distance and travel time.

value.title: Why MOODI is different
value.subtitle: We built MOODI from the ground up around one insight: travelers think in aesthetics, not locations.

items.title: Mood-First Discovery
items.desc: The only travel app that starts with how you feel, not where you want to go. Your vibe leads the way.

items.title: Visual AI Matching
items.desc: Our AI understands aesthetic moods from images — not keywords — to find your perfect match in Korea.

items.title: Effortless Planning
items.desc: From a handful of photos to a complete travel itinerary in under 60 seconds. Planning was never this easy.

hypothesis.title: Our key hypotheses
hypothesis.subtitle: The assumptions we're validating as we build MOODI.

items.title: Visual preference → Higher satisfaction
items.desc: Travelers who discover spots through mood matching will report higher satisfaction than those using keyword-based search.

items.title: Removing language friction unlocks discovery
items.desc: Eliminating language-based search barriers will significantly increase the number of hidden spots international tourists discover.

items.title: Personalization drives retention
items.desc: Users who complete the mood preference survey will return to MOODI at 3× the rate of those who skip it.

demo.title: See MOODI in action
demo.subtitle: From a mood photo to your perfect Korean travel route.

steps.label: Browse Mood Feed
steps.desc: Explore curated Korean spots in an infinite feed tailored to your taste.

steps.label: Share Your Vibe
steps.desc: Pick 1–5 photos that capture your mood — that's all it takes.

steps.label: Spots Auto-Matched
steps.desc: AI analyzes your mood and pins the perfect spots on the map.

steps.label: AI Route Generated
steps.desc: Your selected spots become an optimized day itinerary automatically.

mockup.upload_sub: Select 1–5 photos that match your vibe

core_features.title:
Three pillars of
the MOODI experience
core_features.subtitle: Each feature is designed around one idea: make the best trip plan with the least effort.

items.title: Mood Feed
items.desc: A personalized infinite-scroll feed of Korean spots curated to your aesthetic preferences. The more you explore, the smarter it gets.

items.title: Spot Recommend
items.desc: Upload 1–5 mood photos, select a region in Korea, and get a map-based recommendation of spots that match your aesthetic — instantly.

items.title: AI Route
items.desc: Tell MOODI your travel dates, group size, and must-visit spots. Our AI generates an optimized day-by-day itinerary.

additional_features.title:
Everything you need
for the perfect trip
additional_features.subtitle: Thoughtful extras that make MOODI a complete travel companion.

items.title: Bookmark & Collections
items.desc: Save spots you love and organize them into collections for future trips.

items.title: Route Sharing
items.desc: Share your routes with friends. They can clone and customize for their own trip.

items.title: Social Login
items.desc: Sign in instantly with Google or Apple — no password required.

items.title: Smart Notifications
items.desc: Get notified when new spots matching your mood are added to your area.

items.title: Spot Detail Pages
items.desc: Full spot pages with photos, mood tags, location info, and nearby recommendations.

items.title: Guest Mode
items.desc: Browse the app without signing up. Sign in when you're ready to save or plan.

goals.title: What success looks like
goals.subtitle: Milestones we're building toward for MOODI's launch and beyond.

output.title: What we're building
output.subtitle: The complete system behind MOODI — from user-facing app to the AI powering it.

items.title: iOS & Android App
items.desc: Native mobile experience with smooth animations, intuitive UX, and full offline support for saved routes.

items.title: AI Recommendation Engine
items.desc: Visual aesthetic matching system trained on Korean travel imagery to surface mood-accurate spots.

items.title: AI Route Generator
items.desc: Intelligent itinerary builder that optimizes for distance, travel time, and aesthetic consistency.

items.title: Spot Content Platform
items.desc: Curated database of 500+ unique Korean spots, each tagged with mood, region, and aesthetic category.

sources.title: Research & Data Behind MOODI
sources.subtitle: Our product decisions are grounded in real data and user research.

items.title: Korea Tourism Organization
items.desc: 2023 Inbound Tourism Statistics — 10.3 million foreign visitors to South Korea. Top source countries: China, Japan, USA, Taiwan, and Southeast Asia.

items.title: User Research Interviews
items.desc: 30 in-depth interviews with foreign travelers aged 20–35 from across Asia, North America, and Europe, conducted over 8 weeks.

items.title: Competitive Analysis
items.desc: Benchmarking against Naver Map, Kakao Map, TripAdvisor, and Pinterest for travel discovery patterns and UX gaps.

items.title: Visual Aesthetic AI Research
items.desc: Academic papers on image-based aesthetic similarity, mood classification, and visual content recommendation systems.
